title: OIG LEIE excluded providers in NDH
headline: Of 8,551 actively-excluded LEIE NPIs, the 2026-05-08 NDH bulk export contains 9,006 matching resource appearances — 8,008 as Practitioner resources and 998 as Organization resources (some excluded individuals are listed under both). Each match warrants immediate state Medicaid revalidation under 42 CFR § 455.436.
denominator_note: 8,551 is the count of distinct active LEIE NPIs; 9,006 is the count of NDH resource appearances (an excluded individual may appear as both a Practitioner and an Organization, so resource appearances can exceed distinct NPIs).
notes: LEIE source: oig.hhs.gov/exclusions/downloadables/UPDATED.csv. Total LEIE rows: 83,001; with real NPI: 8,551 (10.3%); still actively excluded: 8,551. The 89% of LEIE rows without a populated NPI (pre-NPI-era exclusions) require demographic match logic in the state MMIS — out of scope for AINPI's NPI-keyed methodology. Each match here is a data-quality flag, not a fraud determination — investigation, hearing rights, and reinstatement claims belong to the state PI unit and the OIG. The LEIE search portal at exclusions.oig.hhs.gov is the authoritative source for any individual verification.
